case_title: JEROME ALEXANDER FRIED VS. LOUIS EUGENE EBERTS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIED, JEROME ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT EBERTS, LOUIS EUGENE ALAMARO, MONTHER MADALAH DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-03-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-26-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100076507): LARSEN, BRIAN L SUBSTITUTED FOR AZIZI, DANIEL AS ATTORNEY FOR FRIED, JEROME ALEXANDER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-07-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 100078237)
